capabilityGroups.name: Workspace Coordination
capabilityGroups.description: Workspace-scoped navigation, overview, and cross-surface coordination.

capabilityGroups.name: Agent Execution
capabilityGroups.description: Session-centric agent runs, recovery, and traceable execution context.

capabilityGroups.name: Kanban Automation
capabilityGroups.description: Task flow, lane automation, and workflow progression.

capabilityGroups.name: Team Collaboration
capabilityGroups.description: Multi-agent and multi-session collaboration inside a workspace.

capabilityGroups.name: Governance and Settings
capabilityGroups.description: Harness, fluency, MCP, settings, and platform governance surfaces.

features.name: Workspace Overview
features.summary: Entry point for a selected workspace and its scoped surfaces.

features.name: Session Recovery
features.summary: Restore, inspect, and continue workspace-scoped agent sessions.

features.name: Kanban Workflow
features.summary: Coordinate tasks through lane transitions, automation, and git-aware execution.

features.name: Team Runs
features.summary: Orchestrate and inspect multi-agent team runs within a workspace.

features.name: Harness Console
features.summary: Inspect repo signals, governance surfaces, and fitness-related runtime status.
